assignments.description: Builds the sparse Person Account SObject with PersonHomePhone set to the Household's Phone value for the update.
assignments.name: Assign_PersonHomePhone_From_Household
assignments.label: Assign PersonHomePhone From Household

assignments.description: Captures the runtime fault message when the Account update fails, ending the flow gracefully rather than rolling back the triggering ACR transaction.
assignments.name: Assign_Fault_Message
assignments.label: Capture Fault and End

decisions.description: Proceeds only when the parent Account of the ACR is a Household (Is_Household__c=true). Non-household accounts (organizations) do not participate in the member phone cascade.
decisions.name: Is_Household
decisions.label: Is Household?

decisions.description: Checks whether the Person Account's PersonHomePhone differs from the Household's Phone. Only proceeds to update when there is a real difference — idempotent guard that prevents unnecessary writes and recursion.
decisions.name: Phone_Differs
decisions.label: Phone Differs?

Flow.description: AccountContactRelation AfterSave flow. Fires when IsActive, Sync_Household_Phone__c, or Roles changes and all three sync conditions are met (Roles INCLUDES Household Member, IsActive=true, Sync_Household_Phone__c=true). Copies the Household Account's Phone to the linked Person Account's PersonHomePhone when they differ. This triggers SMQS_Sync_Person_Account_to_Household_Phone, which pushes back to the household (idempotent — values will already match). The existing SMQS Phone trio reconciles the member's CPP records as a downstream side effect.
Flow.interviewLabel: SMQS Phone Sync AccountContactRelation to Household Account {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: SMQS Phone Sync AccountContactRelation to Household Account

recordLookups.description: Loads the parent Account (Household) to check Is_Household__c and Phone fields.
recordLookups.name: Get_Household_Account
recordLookups.label: Get Household Account

recordLookups.description: Loads the Person Account linked to the ACR's Contact via PersonContactId. Returns Id and PersonHomePhone for the idempotency comparison.
recordLookups.name: Get_Member_Person_Account
recordLookups.label: Get Member Person Account

recordUpdates.description: Updates the Person Account's PersonHomePhone to match the Household's Phone. Fires SMQS_Sync_Person_Account_to_Household_Phone, which pushes back to the Household (idempotent no-op because values now match). The SMQS Phone trio also fires and reconciles the member's CPP records.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Member_Person_Account_Phone
recordUpdates.label: Update Member Person Account (Phone)

variables.description: Populated when the Account update faults. Allows the flow to end gracefully rather than rolling back the triggering ACR transaction.
variables.name: var_FaultMessage

variables.description: Sparse Person Account SObject for the update. Id and PersonHomePhone are set in Assign_PersonHomePhone_From_Household before the update.
variables.name: var_PersonAccountToUpdate
